subject: Write a comprehensive internal developer README
description:
Read the existing README.md and all docs produced by previous tasks. Produce a new document at `docs/DEVELOPER.md` that serves as a comprehensive internal developer guide covering:

1. Repository overview and architecture
2. Getting started (clone, install, build, test)
3. How to add a new skill
4. How to add a new script
5. How to modify schemas
6. How the worker pipeline works
7. How to debug common issues
8. Release process
9. Key design decisions and their rationale
10. Glossary of SAGA-specific terms

This should synthesize information from all other analysis docs into one cohesive guide.
doneWhen: docs/DEVELOPER.md exists with comprehensive coverage of all 10 sections.
